_note: Maps a Claude Code session id -> '<Subsystem>/<Module>' taxonomy prefix (v2 convention). Vocabulary is from Quality/modules-features-matrix/modules.json (issue #19). Value null = no taxonomy prefix. Sessions absent from this map get only the '#PR<N> - ' / '[no PR] - ' core (no taxonomy). Edit freely; rename_sessions_by_pr.py validates the module against the matrix vocab (+ provisional gaps) and warns on typos.
